package rulefixtures

// scenario for errors_new_for_static_sentinel: `errors.New("some error")` called repeatedly in hot paths instead of a package-level sentinel
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule480NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario480Negative(records []Rule480NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
